sevenDay.synopsis: It's a mixed bag of weather this week. We'll see widespread VFR conditions today and tomorrow, but on Wednesday, a front will approach the area. Cigs will be questionable Wednesday AM, winds will be gusty (G20kts), and there's a chance for showers and ISOLD TS during the PM and N1. Rain chances could carry over into Thursday AM. All clear on Friday, but winds will be gusty. Here comes another cold front on Saturday, which could bring more cigs and most importantly, more rain chances to the Wiregrass.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 27 APR - 03 MAY
